title: Genuine!
body:
# Ever wanted to play Minecraft with vanilla plus mods? 
But most modpacks add more **PLUS** than vanilla! 
This modpack aims to only add visual improvement with some VERY small gameplay tweaks!    


_P.S I suggests playing with a shader (sorry potato pc's ToT)_

### Features: 
**_not all of them just stuff you wont notice if you never use them_**

- Customizable Elytra 
- Armor Elytra 
- Eazy Elytra Takeoff 
- Crawling 
- Vein Miner _(Need to be holding shift)_
- Eazy Tree Cutting _(Need to be holding shift)_
- Essentials
- Right Click To Harvest
- Chipped
- Boardless Fullscreen _(Needs to be enabled in video settings)_
- Better Walls _(Connects walls and fences)_
- Fence On Slabs
- Carry on _(Need to be holding shift and then click to use)_
- Cauldron Expansion _(Adds features from bedrock cauldrons)_
- Linkable Minecarts
- Connectable Chains
- Grind Stone Transfer _(Use a grindstone to transfer a enchant to another book)_
- Play Any Music From The Minecraft Soundtrack _(Press M)_
- Voice chat _(Press V)_
- Sleep During The Day
- Craftable Saddle's And Chainmail
- Rolling down in the Deep _(Press O to active)_
